title: [Gemini CLI] Process 100-Page Documents with Long-Context Analysis
description: Use Gemini CLI to process a long document — extract key information, generate a summary, and answer specific questions — all in one session.

steps.title: Install Gemini CLI and set up API key
steps.instruction: Install Gemini CLI and configure it with your Google AI Studio API key.
steps.prompt: How do I install Gemini CLI and set my GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable?
steps.expected_result: Gemini CLI installed and responding to commands
steps.tip: Get a free API key from aistudio.google.com — the free tier supports Gemini 1.5 Pro with 1M token context

steps.title: Load and summarize a long document
steps.instruction: Feed a PDF or text document to Gemini CLI and generate a structured summary.
steps.prompt: Read this document and provide: 1) A 3-sentence executive summary, 2) The 5 most important points, 3) Any action items or recommendations mentioned, 4) Key data or statistics referenced.
steps.expected_result: A structured summary of the document with key points and data extracted
steps.tip: Gemini CLI handles PDFs natively — no need to convert to text first

steps.title: Ask specific questions about the document
steps.instruction: Ask detailed questions about specific sections of the document.
steps.prompt: Based on the document: What is the main methodology used? Are there any caveats or limitations mentioned? What conclusions does the author draw?
steps.expected_result: Accurate, document-grounded answers to your questions
steps.tip: Ask follow-up questions in the same session — Gemini CLI maintains context within a session

steps.title: Compare multiple documents
steps.instruction: Feed two documents to Gemini CLI and compare their content.
steps.prompt: I have two versions of a report. Compare them and tell me: What was added? What was removed? What changed significantly? Produce a structured diff summary.
steps.expected_result: A clear comparison showing differences between the two documents
steps.tip: Use `--file doc1.pdf --file doc2.pdf` to pass both documents in one command

challenge: Build a shell script that takes a folder of PDFs as input, runs Gemini CLI on each one, and outputs a single markdown file with a summary of each document.

videos.title: Gemini CLI Long Context Document Processing
videos.search_keyword: Gemini CLI long context document analysis tutorial 2026
